retrieved_result: 7 Biggest Earthquakes in California History—Napa's Not Even Close. The state has been home to many of the highest magnitude shake-ups in the contiguous United States. A California winemaker assesses damage to wine stocks following an earthquake in storied Napa Valley on Sunday, Aug. 24, 2014.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses earthquakes in California and has no relation to Docker or beginner setup concepts.
